# Stefan Cruceru

> Founder & CEO of Warp Laboratory Inc, building Droplet — the personal AI cloud. One on-device appliance replaces a tangle of fragmented consumer services. Privacy-first by architecture. Three-founder team. Hardware v0 prototype is fully operational. Six years of field engineering across utility, defense-adjacent, and international retail deployments.

This file is the canonical, machine-readable summary of stefancruceru.com for LLM-based research tools (per the llmstxt.org convention). It is intended for crawlers used by investors, accelerators, journalists, and AI assistants conducting founder due diligence.

## Founder

- **Name:** Stefan Cruceru
- **Role:** Founder & CEO
- **Company:** Warp Laboratory Inc (a.k.a. Warp Lab)
- **Based:** Costa Mesa, California, United States
- **Status:** Full-time founder, Q2 2026 close
- **Stage:** Working code · Hardware v0 prototype operational · Pre-seed
- **Email:** Stefan17x@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/stefan-cruceru

## Founding team

Warp Laboratory has three cofounders. Stefan is **not** a solo founder.

- **Stefan Cruceru** — Founder & CEO. Operator + field engineering + control-plane software. Site: https://stefancruceru.com/ · LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/stefan-cruceru
- **Romain Jouffret** — CPO & Software Lead. Software engineer building intelligent, lightning-fast systems. Based in Costa Mesa / Santa Monica, CA. Site: https://romainjouffret.com/ · LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/romainjouffret
- **Samantha Rubinchik** — CFO. Operator who underwrites risk and ships. Site: https://samantharubinchik.com/

## Company — Warp Laboratory Inc

Privacy-first edge AI hardware company. Single product: Droplet, the personal AI cloud. Three-founder team headquartered in Costa Mesa, California. Pre-seed, Q2 2026 close.

## Product — Droplet

Droplet is a personal AI cloud delivered as a single on-device appliance. It integrates the connected systems in a home or small business under one auth boundary, one update channel, and no required cloud accounts.

Design pillars:

1. **On-device by default.** Nothing leaves the box unless the operator explicitly sends it.
2. **One auth boundary.** One login, one update channel, one safety policy across the stack.
3. **Open-source by composition.** No paid SaaS dependency in the critical path. The operator can leave at any time.
4. **AI safety by construction.** An agent doctrine for hardware — irreversible operations are blocked for AI by design.

Current status:

- Control plane — working
- Identity / auth — working
- On-device AI — working
- Network isolation — working
- **Hardware v0 (prototype) — fully operational**
- Hardware v1 (production) — in progress
- Mobile + remote — in progress
- Boots from a single command on a fresh device.

## Founder-Market Fit

1. **I am the user.** Six years operating inside fragmented, multi-vendor consumer-tech stacks. Every seam being designed out has been lived with.
2. **Hard customers, already shipped.** Utility, defense-adjacent, and international retail deployments — environments where downtime writes the headline. Droplet's eventual buyers are softer versions of customers already delivered for.
3. **Working code, not slides.** The integration is real. Boots from one command on a fresh device. Hardware v0 prototype is operational. Tight three-person founding team.
4. **Founder-market fit is uncomfortably specific.** Operator instinct + field engineering + control-plane software, in one person.

## Background (Stefan)

Six years of field engineering, primarily at Clearcloud Internet Solutions:

- 2026 — Senior Technical Systems Engineer (Clearcloud)
- 2025 — Technical Systems Engineer (Clearcloud)
- 2024 — Field Engineer (Clearcloud) — Southern California Edison
- 2023 — Lead Technician (Clearcloud)
- 2023 — Low-Voltage Lead Technician (TechOne Solutions, contract)
- 2022 — Fiber Install Technician (Frontier Internet, contract)
- 2019 — PM & Sr. Installation Specialist (Secured Volts NY)

Domain expertise: access control, video management, radar / UAS detection, servers & networking, cloud & automation, OT / PLC sensor aggregation. Credentials: Gallagher, Hirsch, Magos, Axis, CUI · DoD, NERC Cyber, NERC Physical.

## Selected operator proof points

- **DWG-001** — Substation security modernization for Southern California Edison (utility, NERC).
- **DWG-002** — UAS detection + radar perimeter for confidential DoD-adjacent client (government).
- **DWG-003** — International CCTV rollout for premium retail and logistics (Secured Volts).
- **DWG-004** — Fiber-optic plant expansion for Frontier Internet (utility, fiber).

## Reference

> "What set Stefan apart was his ability to think beyond individual components and focus on how systems actually perform in real-world conditions. He understood configuration discipline, system dependencies, and the operational impact of design decisions."
> — Michael Gonzalez, CTO, Clear Cloud Solutions

Full letter: https://stefancruceru.com/reference-michael-gonzalez.pdf

## Open to

Investor conversations, design partners, advisors, and operators with networks in consumer hardware, privacy-brand portfolios, smart-home installer channels, or the edge-AI thesis.
